narrative:
Twinsburg 1-C (precinct in Summit County) has 865 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.2 percentage points.
